Safety-floor, NOT coverage. Colloquial Gulf dialect, code-switched, and full symptom vocabulary are the clinician-authored Tier-2 follow-up. Fires against `raw` (safety_check.py:286 passes both message_en and raw), bypassing the lossy AR->EN translation that caused the live prod bypass.
